The Baker

Made from scratch,
with heart

Every cake that leaves this kitchen in Ware, Hertfordshire is made entirely by hand — no mixes, no shortcuts. Just quality ingredients, real butter, and a whole lot of care.

Whether it’s a layered celebration cake for a birthday or baby shower, a box of traditional Welsh cakes dusted in sugar, or freshly baked cookies — each bake is made to order and treated as something special.

Based in Ware, Hertfordshire — but proudly Welsh at heart — Tŷ Gwyn Bakes (White House Bakes) was born from a lifelong love of baking and a desire to make those sweet moments in life a little more homemade.

Allergen-friendly options are available — just mention any dietary requirements when you get in touch.

📍 Based in Ware, Hertfordshire
🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 Proudly Welsh · Wedi’i wneud â chariad
What We Offer

The Menu

Everything is made to order — get in touch to discuss flavours, sizes and availability.

01

Celebration Cakes

Layered, frosted, and finished with care. Birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries — any occasion deserves something beautiful. Choose your flavours, fillings, and style.

02

Cupcakes

Perfectly portioned and beautifully decorated — cupcakes for every occasion. From elegant buttercream swirls to custom themed designs, each one is finished with the same care as a full celebration cake.

03

Welsh Cakes

A Welsh kitchen staple — soft, buttery, and dusted in caster sugar. Perfect for gifts, events, or just because.

04

Cookies & Bakes

Chunky cookies, brownies, and seasonal bakes made to order. Great as gifts, party favours, or a little treat for yourself. Ask about current flavours.

Ready to order something special? Fill in the form and I’ll be in touch to discuss your order, agree on flavours and design, and confirm availability and pricing.
